game_name: The Magical Quest Starring Mickey Mouse

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundational movement mechanics established before outfit complexity
Primary combat mechanic using default outfit

element_introduction_order.element: Magician outfit (magic blasts, underwater breathing, magic carpet control)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: First special ability outfit; introduces charged attack mechanic and magic meter management

element_introduction_order.element: Magic meter and magical lamp collection
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Resource management system paired with magician outfit introduction

element_introduction_order.element: Firefighter uniform (water spray, fire extinguishing, ice formation, block pushing)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Second special outfit; expands puzzle-solving with environmental interaction

element_introduction_order.element: Water meter and fire hydrant collection
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Second resource management system paralleling magician outfit pattern
Third special outfit; introduces vertical traversal with grappling mechanics
Climactic confrontation requiring mastery of all mechanics

typical_relief_triggers: Successful enemy defeat via projectiles or throws
Safe platforming sections between combat encounters
typical_tension_triggers: New outfit introduction forcing learning curve
Vertical traversal sections requiring grappling precision
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive difficulty curve with outfit-gated complexity escalation; early levels establish base mechanics, mid-levels layer special abilities with resource management, late levels demand integration of all systems

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Coin and heart placement suggests exploration for optional upgrades; fire hydrants and magical lamps scattered for optional resource gathering

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction of base platforming and grab/throw mechanics; safe contexts for learning
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalation through outfit acquisition (levels 2-4); each outfit introduces distinct mechanic requiring mastery before next outfit; resource meter management adds complexity layer
difficulty_curve.late_game: Integration phase where mastery of all three special outfits required; Emperor Pete confrontation demands synthesis of learned abilities
notable_spikes: Level 2: Magician outfit introduction and magic meter management debut
Level 3: Firefighter uniform with environmental puzzle-solving (fire extinguishing, ice formation, block pushing)
Level 4: Grappling hook vertical traversal mechanics
Final Boss: Emperor Pete requires integration of all outfit abilities

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level (2-4) introduces one new outfit at its beginning, establishing a learning phase before progression to next outfit; new mechanic paired with immediate practical application contexts
Special outfits introduce paired resource meters (magic meter/magical lamps for magician; water meter/fire hydrants for firefighter) requiring player resource management discipline

Outfits unlock new ways to interact with level spaces: magician breathes underwater and controls carpets; firefighter extinguishes fires and forms ice; climber swings on hooks; creates puzzle-solving escalation
